title: Motes and Marks
storyPurpose: Spark imitates Thornling / chases motes; then markings flare.

panels.description: Spark clumsily imitates Thornling's hop; Thornling delights.
Spark chases floating rift-dust motes; Mira smiles warmly.

bubbles.speaker: Mira Eggwarden
bubbles.text: Curiosity that can play is Keeper-shaped.

panels.description: Suddenly Spark's cyan-gold markings flare hard; motes shatter; companions brace.

dialogue.speaker: Mira Eggwarden
dialogue.text: Curiosity that can play is Keeper-shaped.

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Warm earth greens, sandstone, timber, moss first; cyan rift energy and amber hearth as accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "Spark's Journey" Issue #2, STORY PAGE 8/25 — Motes and Marks. Story purpose: Spark imitates Thornling / chases motes; then markings flare. Layout: three-stack. 3 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p8a): Spark clumsily imitates Thornling's hop; Thornling delights. Panel 2 (p8b): Spark chases floating rift-dust motes; Mira smiles warmly. Panel 3 (p8c): Suddenly Spark's cyan-gold markings flare hard; motes shatter; companions brace. Characters: mira-eggwarden. Creatures: spark, thornling, bramblefox, mossprig. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, unstable glow when frightened, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Environment: Riftwild Commons fringe. Time: dawn. Weather: post-storm clear. Lighting: soft dawn amber with cyan accents. Continuity: {"spark":{"emotion":"startled overload","glow":"flare spike","destabilization":1}} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes.
artAlt: Motes and Marks — Spark's Journey page 8
transcript: SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Curiosity that can play is Keeper-shaped.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Hey— hey. Breathe with me.
